description_long: This is a rustic, two-story wooden cabin with a dark, weathered gable roof and a prominent front porch. The facade features a green-trimmed balcony railing and a matching window frame, with a swinging door on the upper level and a sign reading 'SALOON' beside the main entrance. The structure is primarily constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a sturdy, old-western appearance. The windows are small and rectangular, with green latticework, and are asymmetrically placed on the sides and rear. The porch is supported by simple wooden posts and extends across the front, providing a sheltered entryway. The overall design suggests a historical or themed building, likely intended for use as a saloon or similar establishment in an urban or themed environment.
description: A two-story rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, front porch, green-trimmed windows, and a balcony, styled as an old-western saloon.
description_view_0: Side view showing the overhanging gable roof, green-trimmed window, and the side of the front porch and balcony.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance, porch, balcony with green railing, upper swinging door, and 'SALOON' sign.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a green-trimmed window and clear view of the porch and balcony structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a single small green-trimmed window and the plain wooden back wall.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs, constructed from dark wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Three small, rectangular windows with green trim: one on each side and one on the rear, asymmetrically distributed and not grouped
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the upper front facade, accessible from the balcony; no other exterior doors visible
